evals.prompt: Review the ADR at evals/fixtures/adr-0001-event-bus.md using the reviewer panel. Produce the PDF and PPTX reports.
evals.expected_output: A adr-review/ directory next to the ADR containing adr-0001-event-bus-review.pdf and adr-0001-event-bus-review.pptx. The review should flag this ADR as thin — missing alternatives, no ops/security/cost discussion, vague context. Overall recommendation should be 'Needs revision'.

evals.prompt: Can you run the architecture reviewer panel on evals/fixtures/adr-0002-postgres-to-dynamo.md? I need both a PDF and a slide deck.
evals.expected_output: Both report files generated. Review should acknowledge the ADR's strengths (alternatives considered, migration plan, rollback story) while probing remaining gaps (no explicit cost numbers, no security section, key-person risk).

evals.prompt: I have an architecture decision doc I need reviewed. Please critique it.
evals.expected_output: Skill should prompt the user for the location of the ADR before proceeding (per Step 1 of the workflow).
